subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Bear thou witness within thyself that, verily, He is God, the Mighty, the All-Wise, and He Who hath been sent in the name of 'Alí [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسن ان اشهد فی نفسک انه هو الله العزیز الحکیم و الذی ارسله باسم علی
subcodes.subjects: @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @station of the Manifestation of God
